title: 公平交易 / Fair Dealing
summary: MAS 公平交易指引提出 5 项面向客户的成果,要求董事会/高管把公平对待客户置于文化核心。 / The MAS Fair Dealing Guidelines set out five customer outcomes and require the board/senior management to place fair dealing at the heart of culture.

sections.heading: 五项成果
sections.body: 1) 公平对待是文化核心(董事会/高管担责);2) 产品适合目标客群;3) 代表称职;4) 信息清晰相关及时;5) 投诉独立有效及时处理。

sections.heading: Five outcomes
sections.body: 1) Fair dealing central to culture (board/management responsible); 2) products suit target customers; 3) competent representatives; 4) clear, relevant, timely information; 5) complaints handled independently, effectively, promptly.

sections.heading: 责任主体
sections.body: 董事会与高级管理层对落实公平交易成果负首要责任,贯穿设计/销售/售后。

sections.heading: Responsibility
sections.body: The board and senior management bear primary responsibility across design/sales/after-sales.

keyPoints: 5 项公平交易成果 / Five fair-dealing outcomes
董事会/高管担首要责任 / Board/management primarily responsible
产品适合目标客群 / Products suit target customers
